text:
Wei (Robin) Wang
Wei (Robin) Wang serves as the Senior Director of the Chancellors’ Office at Duke Kunshan University (DKU). He reports directly to the Executive Vice Chancellor and supports all Chancellors. In this role, Robin provides high-level administrative support to the Chancellors. He leads, manages, and coaches the efficient team within the Chancellors’ Office and International Relations. Robin is responsible for formulating new university priorities, identifying significant challenges, developing policy recommendations and necessary actions, and spearheading international short-term programs and cross-border lifelong learning initiatives aimed at driving revenue growth. He steers the operational and strategic agenda of the Chancellors. This involves preparing topics for key meetings and conducting post-meeting follow-ups to ensure the implementation of approved decisions. Additionally, he oversees the initiation and completion of specific projects and tasks assigned by the Chancellors.
Robin Wang has spent almost 8 years in key managerial positions at DKU, including the head of International Relations from 2017 to 2023 and Director of the Chancellors’ Office from 2023 to 2025. Before joining DKU, Robin worked for the International Office of Sichuan University for 7 years. In 2015, he received a certificate as a qualified diplomatic officer from the National Academy of Education Administration. Robin holds a Bachelor of Arts degree in English Language and Cultures from Central China Normal University and a Master of Education from the University of Malaya.
